app.name: Dev-SSO
app.tagline: Single sign-on portal for all your applications.

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Use your SSO credentials to access every work application.
login.password_subtitle: A secure session will be created after successful verification.
login.retry_after: The sign-in button will be available again in {seconds} seconds.
login.no_account: Don't have an account? Contact your organization administrator.
login.error_generic: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
login.error_unexpected: Unable to process sign-in. Try again shortly.

callback.description: Processing the OIDC response and preparing a secure session for you.
callback.fallback_error: Unable to process the sign-in callback.

home.title: Hello, {name} 👋
home.description: A summary of your SSO account in a single liquid glass canvas. Monitor your profile, sessions, applications, and security without leaving the portal.
home.sessions_metric_error: Failed to load sessions. This number is not an indicator of your current login status.
home.sessions_metric_desc: A summary of active sessions on devices and apps; this does not indicate whether you are currently logged in.
home.apps_metric_desc: Applications you have authorized via SSO.
home.shortcut_profile_desc: Manage account data and identity displayed in the portal.
home.shortcut_apps_desc: Audit applications you have authorized via SSO.
home.shortcut_sessions_desc: Monitor active devices and terminate suspicious sessions.
home.shortcut_security_desc: Manage MFA, passwords, and account login control.

apps.title: Connected Applications
apps.description: Applications that currently have access to your account via Dev-SSO. Revoke access at any time if you no longer use the application.
apps.empty_description: Applications you authorize via Dev-SSO will appear here.
apps.dormant_warning: Consider revoking access for applications that have not been used for a long time.
apps.revoke_error_generic: Failed to revoke application access. Try again in a moment.
apps.revoke_error_csrf: Security session expired. Reload the page and try again.
apps.revoke_error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.
apps.revoke_error_unauthorized: SSO session expired. Please sign in again to revoke this application.
apps.revoke_error_forbidden: Access to this application cannot be revoked from this account.
apps.revoke_error_not_found: Application is no longer connected to your account. Reload the page.
apps.revoke_error_server: SSO service is currently unavailable. Try again later.
apps.dialog_description: The application will no longer be able to access your account until you authorize it again.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Monitor all devices currently logged in to your account. End sessions from unrecognized devices to maintain account security.
sessions.empty_description: Active sessions will appear here after you log in.
sessions.other_empty_description: Your account is only accessed from this device.
sessions.confirm_single_description: The device using this session will be forced to log out and {count} application connections from this session will be disconnected.
sessions.confirm_global_description: All devices will be logged out, including this device. You will need to log in again. Continue?

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.description: Submit a request to export, delete, or anonymize personal data with a 30-day review period and trackable status.
privacy.request_helper: Requests will be processed within 30 days (deadline calculated upon submission). Deletion or anonymization requests are processed only after verification.
privacy.reason_placeholder: Example: required for internal account audit purposes
privacy.status_helper: Monitor the status and fulfillment deadline of your requests.
privacy.empty_requests: No requests submitted yet. Use the form above to start.
privacy.desc_export: Get a downloadable copy of your account data.
privacy.desc_delete: Permanently delete account data. Some data may still be retained in accordance with legal obligations.
privacy.desc_anonymize: Mask identity on historical data that must be retained.
privacy.confirm_title_delete: Are you sure you want to request deletion?
privacy.confirm_title_anonymize: Are you sure you want to request anonymization?
privacy.confirm_desc_delete: This action cannot be undone once verified. Our team will review the request before the data is processed.
privacy.confirm_desc_anonymize: This action is irreversible once verified. Identity on historical data will be permanently masked.

errors.not_found_description: This URL is not registered in the portal. Return home or sign in.

api.status_400: The request is invalid. Check the data and try again.
api.status_401: Your SSO session expired. Please sign in again.
api.status_403: You are not allowed to access this resource.
api.status_408: The server took too long to respond. Try again.
api.status_409: A data conflict occurred. Reload and try again.
api.status_419: The security session expired. Reload the page and try again.
api.status_429: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.
api.rate_limit_retry_after: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
api.status_5xx: The SSO service is unavailable. Try again later.
api.network_error: Unable to reach the SSO server.
api.timeout: The request to the server took too long. Try again.

Your SSO session expired. Please sign in again.
The access token is invalid. Please sign in again.
messages.Server Error: The SSO service is unavailable. Try again later.
Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.
You are not allowed to access this resource.
The security session expired. Reload the page and try again.
messages.Page Expired: The security session expired. Reload the page and try again.
messages.You must enroll a multi-factor authentic: Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) before accessing the admin panel.
messages.Akun Anda telah direset oleh admin. Akti: Your administrator reset your MFA. Enable multi-factor authentication again before continuing.
messages.Your administrator has reset your multi-: Your administrator reset your MFA. Enroll a new second factor before continuing.

errors._generic: Sign-in could not be completed. Restart from the sign-in page or return to the original application.
errors.invalid_request: The authorization request is invalid. Restart from the sign-in page.
errors.invalid_client: The application failed to authenticate with SSO. Contact the application administrator.
errors.invalid_grant: The authorization session is no longer valid. Sign in again to continue.
errors.unauthorized_client: This application is not allowed to use SSO. Contact an administrator.
errors.unsupported_grant_type: This token request type is not supported. Contact the application administrator.
errors.access_denied: The access request was denied. Try again or return to the original application.
errors.unsupported_response_type: This authorization mode is not supported. Restart from the sign-in page.
errors.invalid_scope: The requested permission scope is invalid. Contact an administrator.
errors.server_error: An SSO server error occurred. Try again shortly.
errors.temporarily_unavailable: The SSO service is busy. Try again shortly.
errors.interaction_required: Additional action is required to continue sign-in. Try again without prompt=none.
errors.login_required: Your SSO session ended. Sign in again to continue.
errors.account_selection_required: Select the account to use, then try again.
errors.consent_required: Access consent is required. Continue to the consent page.
errors.invalid_token: The access token is invalid or expired. Please sign in again.
errors.insufficient_scope: Access was denied because the permission scope is insufficient. Contact an administrator.
errors.invalid_request_uri: The authorization request is invalid. Restart from the sign-in page.
errors.invalid_request_object: The authorization request is invalid. Restart from the sign-in page.
errors.request_not_supported: This request mode is not supported. Restart from the sign-in page.
errors.request_uri_not_supported: This request mode is not supported. Restart from the sign-in page.
errors.registration_not_supported: Client registration is not supported. Contact an administrator.
errors.session_expired: Your SSO session expired. Please sign in again to continue.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.
errors.mfa_enrollment_required: This application requires multi-factor authentication. Enable MFA on your account and try again.
errors.mfa_reenrollment_required: Your account was reset by an administrator. Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) again before continuing.
